title: ParameterOverrides
description: Sparse parameter overrides. Only include keys whose values differ from the opening type ParametricSchema defaults. Omitted keys inherit schema defaults when resolved (InstanceParameters.resolve / ParametricSchema.mergeDefaults). Persisted on OpeningInstance.parameters; editors write back via ParametricSchema.extractOverrides.

overrideValue.description: External/plain JSON value coerced by ParameterBridge. Lengths are millimeters, angles are degrees, counts are integers, enums/choices/material refs are strings.
